psalm-108-1.verse:
My heart is steadfast, O God;
  I will sing, I will sing praises, even with my soul.
psalm-108-1.prayer: Lord, make my heart steadfast in You. Help me praise You with confidence, faith, and devotion.

psalm-108-2.verse:
Awake, harp and lyre;
  I will awaken the dawn!
psalm-108-2.prayer: Father, awaken worship within me. Let my soul rise with gratitude, joy, and praise.

psalm-108-3.verse:
I will give thanks to You, O Lord, among the peoples,
  And I will sing praises to You among the nations.
psalm-108-3.prayer: Lord, help me give thanks to You among all people and declare Your goodness wherever I go.

psalm-108-4.verse:
For Your lovingkindness is great above the heavens,
  And Your truth reaches to the skies.
psalm-108-4.prayer: Father, Your lovingkindness is great above the heavens, and Your truth reaches to the skies. Help me rest in Your unfailing love.

psalm-108-5.verse:
Be exalted, O God, above the heavens,
  And Your glory above all the earth.
psalm-108-5.prayer: Lord, be exalted above the heavens, and let Your glory cover all the earth. May my life bring honor to Your name.

psalm-108-6.verse:
That Your beloved may be delivered,
  Save with Your right hand, and answer me!
psalm-108-6.prayer: Father, save those You love and answer with Your power. Deliver me by Your right hand and strengthen my trust in You.

psalm-108-7.verse:
God has spoken in His holiness:
  “I will exult, I will portion out Shechem
  And measure out the valley of Succoth.
psalm-108-7.prayer: Lord, You speak with holiness and authority. Help me trust Your promises and surrender to Your will.

psalm-108-8.prayer: Father, every place and every people belong under Your rule. Help me rest in Your sovereign authority.

psalm-108-9.prayer: Lord, every enemy and every obstacle is under Your power. Teach me to walk with courage and confidence in You.

psalm-108-10.verse:
Who will bring me into the besieged city?
  Who will lead me to Edom?
psalm-108-10.prayer: Father, lead me into every challenge I face. Go before me and guide my steps with wisdom and strength.

psalm-108-11.verse:
Have not You Yourself, O God, rejected us?
  And will You not go forth with our armies, O God?
psalm-108-11.prayer: Lord, when I feel distant or unsure, draw me back to Your presence and remind me that my help comes from You.

psalm-108-12.verse:
Oh give us help against the adversary,
  For deliverance by man is in vain.
psalm-108-12.prayer: Father, give me help against trouble, because human strength is never enough. Teach me to rely fully on You.

psalm-108-13.verse:
Through God we will do valiantly,
  And it is He who shall tread down our adversaries.
psalm-108-13.prayer: Lord, through You I can do valiantly. Thank You that true victory comes from Your strength and faithfulness.

psalm-108-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for Your steadfast love, truth, power, and faithfulness. Make my heart steadfast in worship and teach me to trust You in every battle. Lead me by Your strength, help me rely on You rather than human ability, and let my life exalt Your glory. May my confidence remain in You, the One who gives true victory.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
